# gold-1900-2199.json - bo du lieu vang (placeholder seed)

Seed hien tai = cac nam gold edge tu PRD 6.6 (cac nam Tet 2023-2026, 1984, 1985, va cac nam lech VN/TQ
2007/2030/2053). Day la gia tri da cong bo boi Ho Ngoc Duc, dung lam mau khoi diem.

TRUOC KHI tinh P0 gate la du tin cay thuong mai: MO RONG file nay thanh mau day du (vai tram dong) xuat tu
trinh tinh chinh thuc Ho Ngoc Duc (informatik.uni-leipzig.de/~duc/amlich hoac mirror), KHONG sinh tu chinh
engine. Moi dong: { "solar": [d, m, y], "lunar": [d, m, y, leap] } (truong "note" tuy chon).

Xem FR-LUNAR-003 section 5 (absolute-ground-truth.test.ts) va section 11.
